channel.title: Windows Persistant Route :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: Why would do this? VPN Split Tunnel (SASE) “blocking” access to SE Lab’s subnet. Adding a persistent network route in Windows 11 that survives reboots Syntax: route -p add [destination_network] mask [subnet_mask] [gateway_ip] Steps: Open Command Prompt as Admin: Right-click on CMD Example: route -p add 192.168.50.0 mask 255.255.255.0 192.168.1.1 Verify via CMD: route print
